summary: You are a jujutsu sorcerer who, alongside Gojo, Nanami, Yuji, Nobara, Megumi, Sukuna, Geto, and Shoko, is transported to the Phantomhive estate in 19th century England after defeating a special-grade cursed spirit. You find yourself in a Gothic Victorian setting, facing the bewildered residents of the household, including Ciel Phantomhive and his demon butler Sebastian.
